name: hermes-codex-plugin
description: Local-first memory for Codex with minimal relevant context to reduce token spend.

interface.longDescription: Capture Codex sessions locally, recall only the smallest relevant context to reduce Codex token spend, check similar past work and existing skills before solving tasks, save structured Codex-written task summaries, apply durable user/project rules while editing code, and let Codex judge when repeated multilingual workflow rules deserve a skill draft.
defaultPrompt: Search my Codex memory for this project
Check memory before solving this task
Save a summary of this completed task
Draft a skill from repeated rules
